name: Guangdong KinLong Hardware Products Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong KinLong Hardware Products Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of fittings for architectural hardware in China. The company offers anchor channel and tunnel, arm bracket, hanging bracket, and anti-seismic supporting systems; galfan tension cables, high-strength tension rods, and alloy casting products; window operating systems; and door controls, mechanical locks, smart locks, hotel locks, bathroom fittings, and post railing systems. It also provides point-fixed glass wall fittings, and anchor and stone cladding bolt products; and U-PVC groove door and window accessories, aluminum and home decoration doors, window hardware products, and sealing system products. In addition, the company offers safety shoes, belts, and helmets; protective gloves, respirators, and masks; jackets; reflective vests; work packages; masking film, foam, paper, wrapping film, PE, and masking tapes; explosion-proof, street, buried, underwater, working spot, and solar lights; fence tubes; spotlights; explosion-proof floodlights; electric sweeper cars; and driving and hand push type washing machines. Further, it provides forklifts and aerial platform products; and aluminum work platform products, as well as telescopic standing, telescopic, aluminum folding, aluminum folding extension, aluminum extension, riveting extension, aluminum warehouse platform, and aluminum hinge and single ladders. Additionally, the company offers consulting services to the architectural industry. It also exports its products to approximately 100 countries. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Dongguan, China.
